codeSystems.name: PatientContactRelationship
codeSystems.title: Patient Contact Relationship Codes
codeSystems.description: Local codes used to describe patient contact relationships for course examples.

codeSystems.name: ISO3166Part1Alpha3
codeSystems.title: ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3 Country Codes
codeSystems.description: This CodeSystem resource represents the ISO 3166-1 standard, 2020 edition for country codes, specifically the three-character (alpha-3) codes. It is intended to be a complete and canonical representation of the standard as a FHIR resource.
